en.name: Level 3 — Electrical Station
en.shortDescription: A dangerous old electrical facility of brick corridors and machinery: resource-rich but defended by unusually intelligent entities.
en.atmosphere: Dim brick passages, humming equipment and black pipes, alternating cramped tunnels and vast oppressive industrial halls.
en.tips: Avoid dark paranoia-inducing corridors. Shelter in angel-statue sanctums. Never try to pass the indestructible bars.
